case_title: DAVID LJUNG MADISON VS. BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,330.18 FILED BY MADISON, DAVID LJUNG AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO JAMES BLANDING
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADISON, DAVID LJUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $2,964.55 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,014.55, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES STATUTORY PENALTIES OF $500.00 - DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR ITS PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $1,559.17. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS, (RELEASED EXHIBITS TO OFFICE MANAGER/LATOYA MAYFIELD)
